basic_details.job_title: UPSC – Combined Defence Services Examination – 451 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: UPSC CDS 2 Examination 2026 notification is out to fill 451 vacancies for Combined Defence Services. Candidates can apply online only from 20.05.2026 to 09.06.2026 through UPSC website upsc.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree of a recognised University with Physics and Mathematics at 10+2 level, OR Bachelor of Engineering.

selection_process: Written Examination (Objective Type) + SSB Intelligence & Personality Test + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through https://upsconline.nic.in. No other mode of application is accepted. The Online Application Portal has four modules: Account Creation, Universal Registration (URN - one-time for lifetime), Common Application Form (CAF), and Examination Specific Module. The URN generated is common for all UPSC examinations; the Application Number generated is examination-specific and must be retained.
seo_tags: UPSC CDS 2 Examination 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 451 Combined Defence Services Posts
